summary: FAB (Floating Action Button) redesign testing complete - All features working correctly. FAB is visible, fully on-screen, has radial menu with VIP Hub and Mentor items, glow animation, backdrop close, and navigation to VIP Hub works.
critical_code_review_comments: FAB implementation is well-structured with proper use of PanResponder for drag, Animated for animations, and AsyncStorage for position persistence
SAFE_MARGIN=16 ensures FAB stays within screen bounds
Radial arc menu pattern is modern and user-friendly
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing VIP user
context_for_next_testing_agent: FAB (Floating Action Button) fully tested and working. All features pass: visibility, positioning, glow animation, radial menu open/close, VIP Hub navigation, backdrop close, icon rotation from + to x. The FAB uses position-based clicks at approximately (345, 720) on 390x844 viewport. data-testid='fab-main-toggle' is present but may not work in RN Web Playwright tests - use position-based clicks or text selectors instead.
